# html-to-markdown

> High-performance HTML to Markdown converter built in Rust with bindings for Python, TypeScript, Ruby, Go, Java, C#, PHP, Elixir, R, WebAssembly, and C. Part of the kreuzberg.dev ecosystem.

html-to-markdown converts HTML to clean Markdown with configurable output styles, metadata extraction, visitor pattern callbacks, and table extraction. It achieves 150-280 MB/s throughput, making it 10-80x faster than pure-Python alternatives.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/getting-started/installation/): Install html-to-markdown for any supported language
- [Quick Start](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/getting-started/quickstart/): Get started with HTML to Markdown conversion

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/architecture/): Rust core with polyglot bindings architecture
- [Conversion Pipeline](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/conversion-pipeline/): How the HTML to Markdown conversion works
- [Visitor Pattern](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/visitor-pattern/): Custom callbacks for content filtering and URL rewriting
- [Metadata Extraction](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/metadata-extraction/): Extract title, headers, links, images, and structured data
- [Tag Preservation](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/tag-preservation/): Preserve specific HTML tags during conversion
- [Performance](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/performance/): Performance characteristics and benchmarks

## Guides

- [Basic Conversion](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/basic-conversion/): Core conversion functionality
- [Configuration Options](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/configuration/): Customize heading style, list indent, code blocks, and more
- [Metadata Extraction](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/metadata/): Extract structured metadata from HTML
- [Visitor Pattern](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/visitor/): Build custom conversion dialects with visitor callbacks
- [CLI Usage](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/cli/): Command-line interface reference
- [Security](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/guides/security/): Security considerations and HTML sanitization

## API Reference

- [Rust API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-rust/): Rust core library reference
- [Python API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-python/): Python binding reference
- [TypeScript API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-typescript/): TypeScript/Node.js binding reference
- [Ruby API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-ruby/): Ruby binding reference
- [PHP API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-php/): PHP binding reference
- [Go API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-go/): Go binding reference
- [Java API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-java/): Java binding reference
- [C# API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-csharp/): C# binding reference
- [Elixir API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-elixir/): Elixir binding reference
- [R API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-r/): R binding reference
- [C API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-c/): C FFI binding reference
- [WASM API](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-wasm/): WebAssembly binding reference
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/configuration/): Full configuration options
- [Types](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/reference/types/): Type definitions

## Migration Guides

- [C# v2.19.0](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/migration/csharp-2.19.0/): C# binding migration guide
- [Java v2.19.0](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/migration/java-2.19.0/): Java binding migration guide
- [TypeScript v2.19.0](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/migration/typescript-2.19.0/): TypeScript binding migration guide
